scope: Compact reviewed internals for the MoonCatAccessoryImages on-chain accessory-composition and PNG materialization contract. This file documents source provenance, dependencies, public rendering surfaces, source-confirmed composition behavior, and limitations without importing Solidity source, ABI JSON, accessory data, PNG bytes, or generated outputs.

officialContext.notes: The MoonCatRescue Chained to the Future log links MoonCatAccessoryImages as one of the official on-chain materialization contracts.

role.summary: On-chain contract that composes accessorized MoonCat SVG strings and constructs accessory PNG data URIs for use within those SVGs.
sourceConfirmed: Public accessorizedImageOf overloads accept a uint256 rescueOrder, with optional glow level, allowUnverified flag, or caller-supplied OwnedAccessory list.
The reviewed composition path derives base MoonCat pixel data from MoonCatTraits, MoonCatColors, and MoonCatSVGs, then layers accessory PNG image snippets around it.
accessoryPNG returns a data:image/png;base64 string built from source-provided accessory image data and color/palette helpers.
notIncluded: Accessory IDs are accepted as numeric values but their taxonomy, enumeration, and lifecycle are not established by this review.
No accessory data, palette values, PNG bytes, SVG strings, or rendered per-cat output is imported.

dependencies.name: MoonCatRescue
sourceConfirmedUse: The explicit-accessory composition path and accessoryPNG require rescueOrder < 25440 and convert a rescue order through rescueOrder(rescueOrder) to obtain a bytes5 cat ID.
placementOf also converts its rescueOrder input through rescueOrder(rescueOrder); its reviewed source body has no separate range require.

dependencies.name: MoonCatAccessories
dependencies.type: fixed-address interface referenced by the reviewed source
sourceConfirmedUse: balanceOf(rescueOrder) and ownedAccessoryByIndex(rescueOrder,index) supply the live OwnedAccessory list for the lookup overloads.
doesMoonCatOwnAccessory(rescueOrder,accessoryId) is required for every caller-supplied accessory prepared by prepAccessories.
accessoryImageData(accessoryId) supplies position, palette, dimensions, metadata, and IDAT inputs to the reviewed materialization path.
limitations: This review records only the MoonCatAccessoryImages source-level interface use. It does not review a separate MoonCatAccessories contract artifact, accessory state, or accessory taxonomy.

dependencies.name: MoonCatReference
sourceConfirmedUse: setReferenceContract(address) can update the reference contract through owner-only administration.

dependencies.name: MoonCatTraits
sourceConfirmedUse: The composition path calls kTraitsOf(catId) and consumes facing, expression, pattern, and pose to build base MoonCat pixels and accessory placement.

dependencies.name: MoonCatColors
sourceConfirmedUse: The composition path calls colorsOf(catId) for base MoonCat pixels and accessoryColorsOf(catId) for accessory PNG materialization.
assemblePNG calls BasePalette and colorAlpha while resolving the selected accessory palette.

dependencies.name: MoonCatSVGs
sourceConfirmedUse: The composition path calls getPixelData, boundingBox, svgTag, glowGroup, flip, and uint2str.
Base SVG construction remains owned by MoonCatSVGs; this contract adds accessory materialization and composition around that base path.

rescueOrder.boundary: This contract's reviewed public image entrypoints use the numeric rescue-order convention. The explicit accessory composition path and accessoryPNG enforce rescueOrder < 25440 before converting to a bytes5 cat ID. Do not substitute a bytes5 catId, ERC-721 token ID, local array index, or accessory ID without the separately documented conversion context.

accessoryId.type: uint256 at accessoryPNG and placementOf; uint232 within the caller-supplied OwnedAccessory struct
accessoryId.boundary: The reviewed source passes accessory IDs to the MoonCatAccessories interface. It does not establish a curated accessory ID taxonomy, mapping, or equivalence with any cat identifier.

ownedAccessory.boundary: This struct is accepted by the explicit-accessory accessorizedImageOf overload and prepAccessories. The source confirms ownership is checked per supplied accessory; it does not make supplied data a claim about current accessory state.

glowLevel.boundary: The reviewed assembly distinguishes zero, one, and other values. No broader semantic range is asserted here.

accessorizedImageOf.behavior: Requires rescueOrder < 25440, derives base MoonCat data, prepares the supplied owned-accessory records, and returns an accessorized SVG string.
Reads the current OwnedAccessory list through the MoonCatAccessories interface, then delegates to the explicit-accessory overload.
Delegates with allowUnverified set to false.
Delegates with glowLevel 0 and allowUnverified set to false.

accessoryPNG.behavior: Requires rescueOrder < 25440, obtains cat-specific accessory colors and source accessory image data, then returns a base64 PNG data URI.

placementOf.behavior: Returns source-computed offset, dimensions, mirror, and background values from the rescue-order-derived trait inputs and accessory image metadata.

prepAccessories.behavior: Checks supplied accessory ownership, prepares render records, separates background and foreground records, sorts each by zIndex, and returns both lists.

compositionFlow: The explicit-accessory accessorizedImageOf path enforces rescueOrder < 25440, converts the rescue order to a bytes5 cat ID, reads colorsOf and kTraitsOf, and calls MoonCatSVGs.getPixelData for the base MoonCat pixels.
It reads accessoryColorsOf for cat-specific accessory color input, then calls prepAccessories with the source-derived facing and pose.
prepAccessories requires source-level ownership for each supplied accessory, omits zero z-index entries, splits prepared records into background and foreground lists, and sorts each list by zIndex.
Each prepared accessory is converted to PNG bytes by assemblePNG, base64-encoded into an SVG image snippet, and passed through MoonCatSVGs.flip when its prepared record requires mirroring.
The composition path expands the base MoonCatSVGs bounding box to cover prepared accessory placement before emitting the SVG wrapper.

assembleSVG emits background snippets, base MoonCat pixels, and foreground snippets around the same MoonCatSVGs svgTag wrapper. With glowLevel 0 it emits no glow; with glowLevel 1 it applies glow to base MoonCat pixels; with other values it applies glow to the assembled background, base, and foreground bytes.

sourceConfirmed: assemblePNG creates a PNG byte sequence with a PNG header, IHDR, PLTE, tRNS, IDAT, and PNG footer.
The selected eight-byte accessory palette is resolved through MoonCatColors BasePalette or accessoryColorsOf output, with alpha values from colorAlpha.
accessoryPNG wraps the assembled bytes in a data:image/png;base64 URI, and accessorySVGSnippet embeds the same kind of URI in an SVG image element.
limitations: No palette values, color thresholds, IDAT data, PNG bytes, dimensions, or generated data URIs are imported.
This source review does not independently reproduce, render, or validate exact PNG or SVG output.

guardsAndStateBoundaries: The explicit-accessory accessorizedImageOf path and accessoryPNG require rescueOrder < 25440. The lookup overloads delegate into the explicit path; placementOf has no separate range require in its reviewed body.
prepAccessories requires MoonCatAccessories.doesMoonCatOwnAccessory for each supplied accessory before preparing it.

When allowUnverified is false, the reviewed preparation path uses accessory metadata to suppress entries not marked approved by that source-level check. This does not establish an accessory approval taxonomy or current approval state.
The lookup overload reads the current accessory list when invoked, but this review makes no current ownership, wearing, availability, or chain-state claim.
limitations: This is not a full ABI, full Solidity source, bytecode, constructor-argument, storage-layout, or generated-output import.
No accessory ID taxonomy, accessory contract artifact, placement table, palette value, color threshold, IDAT data, PNG bytes, SVG strings, or per-cat output is included.
The source confirms how this contract calls the MoonCatAccessories interface, but the separate dependency's state, implementation, and lifecycle are not reviewed here.
This review distinguishes rescue-order inputs from bytes5 cat IDs and accessory IDs, but it does not create a new identifier conversion rule or treat rescue order as a generic token ID.
No current ownership, current accessories, approval state, availability, or exact rendered result is asserted.
